rationale: This page is an introductory 'Note to Students' and includes a copyright notice. It outlines the features of the PT 365 document but does not contain substantive scientific content or current affairs data for question generation.
cleanedText:
Note to Students
Dear Students,
PT 365 document comprehensively covers the important current affairs of the last 1 year (365 days) in a consolidated manner to aid Prelims preparation.
In our endeavour to make this document more effective and revision-friendly, the following additions have been incorporated:
- Summarised infographics: It includes aspects like
- Key Application: Applications of technologies such as Gene Editing, Quantum Technology, etc. are presented concisely.
- Working of Technologies: Complex processes like CAR-T Therapy, Brain-Computer Interfaces etc. are explained using simplified visual logic.
- Concept Corner:
- Key Concepts/Technologies have been covered holistically, followed by related developments.
- It will enhance the readability and comprehension of the subsequent articles.
- Tables: Well-structured tables have been used to present key features and aspects of Space missions & satellites, Missiles, etc.
- Quiz: QR-based Smart Quiz will test your knowledge and ensure a more engaging and effective learning process.
Remember, success is the result of small, consistent efforts repeated every day. Stay disciplined, revise regularly, and trust the process.
Best Wishes,
Team VisionIAS
